mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.slug, p.title, p.summary, LEFT(p.summary, 200) AS excerpt, p.post_type_id AS postTypeId, p.series_id AS seriesId, p.chapter_no AS chapterNo, p.cover_asset_id AS coverAssetId, p.sort_order AS sortOrder, p.visibility, p.status, p.publish_date AS publishDate, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS UpdatedAt, pt.name AS postTypeName, u.display_name AS authorName, CEIL(CHAR_LENGTH(p.content_html) / 500) AS readingTime, LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, ROUND(urp.current_page * 100.0 / NULLIF(urp.total_pages, 0)))) AS readingProgress FROM user_reading_progress urp INNER JOIN post p ON urp.post_id = p.id LEFT JOIN post_type pt ON p.post_type_id = pt.id LEFT JOIN users u ON p.created_by = u.id WHERE urp.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND p.visibility IN ('PUBLIC', 'UNLISTED') ORDER BY urp.last_read_at DESC
